name: image_load_side_load_smadhook
raw_query: any where (file.path like~ ("*\\SmadHook32c.dll", "*\\SmadHook64c.dll")) and (not ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\SMADAV\\SmadavProtect32.exe", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\SMADAV\\SmadavProtect64.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\SMADAV\\SmadavProtect32.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\SMADAV\\SmadavProtect64.exe")) and (file.path like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\SMADAV\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\SMADAV\\*"))))
